args.functionArgs: CMAKE_SKIP_RPATH NO CACHE BOOL If set, runtime paths are not added when using shared libraries.
CMAKE_SKIP_INSTALL_RPATH NO CACHE BOOL If set, runtime paths are not added when installing shared libraries, but are added when building.

CMAKE_VERBOSE_MAKEFILE FALSE CACHE BOOL If this value is on, makefiles will be generated without the .SILENT directive, and all commands will be echoed to the console during the make.  This is useful for debugging only. With Visual Studio IDE projects all commands are done without /nologo.
DEFINED ENV{CMAKE_COLOR_DIAGNOSTICS} AND NOT DEFINED CACHE{CMAKE_COLOR_DIAGNOSTICS}
CMAKE_COLOR_MAKEFILE ON CACHE BOOL Enable/Disable color output during build.
NOT DEFINED CMAKE_EXPORT_COMPILE_COMMANDS AND CMAKE_GENERATOR MATCHES Ninja|Unix Makefiles
NOT DEFINED CMAKE_EXPORT_BUILD_DATABASE AND CMAKE_GENERATOR MATCHES Ninja
NOT DEFINED CMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX AND NOT DEFINED ENV{CMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX}
CMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX /usr/local CACHE PATH Install path prefix, prepended onto install directories.
CMAKE_INSTALL_SO_NO_EXE ${CMAKE_INSTALL_SO_NO_EXE} CACHE INTERNAL Install .so files without execute permission.
CMAKE_C_COMPILER_ID STREQUAL GNU AND _IN_TC AND NOT CMAKE_FORCE_DEPFILES
NOT APPLE OR NOT CMAKE_C_COMPILER_VERSION VERSION_LESS 4
NOT CMAKE_C_COMPILER_VERSION VERSION_LESS 4.7 AND NOT APPLE
( NOT DEFINED CMAKE_DEPENDS_USE_COMPILER OR CMAKE_DEPENDS_USE_COMPILER ) AND CMAKE_GENERATOR MATCHES Makefiles|WMake AND CMAKE_DEPFILE_FLAGS_C
NOT CMAKE_C_STANDARD_COMPUTED_DEFAULT OR NOT DEFINED CMAKE_C_EXTENSIONS_COMPUTED_DEFAULT
NOT CMAKE_C_COMPILER_ID STREQUAL GNU OR CMAKE_C_COMPILER_VERSION VERSION_GREATER_EQUAL 12.1
CMAKE_C_FLAGS Flags used by the C compiler
${_PREFIX} ${_INIT} CACHE STRING ${_DOCSTRING} during all build types.
CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE ${CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE_INIT} CACHE STRING Choose the type of build, options are: None Debug Release RelWithDebInfo MinSizeRel ...
CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS Flags used by the linker
${_PREFIX} ${_INIT} CACHE STRING ${_DOCSTRING} during all build types.
CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE ${CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE_INIT} CACHE STRING Choose the type of build, options are: None Debug Release RelWithDebInfo MinSizeRel ...
CMAKE_SHARED_LINKER_FLAGS Flags used by the linker during the creation of shared libraries
${_PREFIX} ${_INIT} CACHE STRING ${_DOCSTRING} during all build types.
CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE ${CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE_INIT} CACHE STRING Choose the type of build, options are: None Debug Release RelWithDebInfo MinSizeRel ...
CMAKE_MODULE_LINKER_FLAGS Flags used by the linker during the creation of modules
${_PREFIX} ${_INIT} CACHE STRING ${_DOCSTRING} during all build types.
CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE ${CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE_INIT} CACHE STRING Choose the type of build, options are: None Debug Release RelWithDebInfo MinSizeRel ...
CMAKE_STATIC_LINKER_FLAGS Flags used by the archiver during the creation of static libraries
${_PREFIX} ${_INIT} CACHE STRING ${_DOCSTRING} during all build types.
CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE ${CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE_INIT} CACHE STRING Choose the type of build, options are: None Debug Release RelWithDebInfo MinSizeRel ...
type IN ITEMS SHARED_LIBRARY SHARED_MODULE EXE
CMAKE_${lang}_COMPILER_LINKER_ID AND CMAKE_${lang}_COMPILER_LINKER_ID STREQUAL GNU AND CMAKE_${lang}_COMPILER_LINKER_VERSION VERSION_LESS 2.41
CMAKE_SYSTEM MATCHES CYGWIN_NT OR CMAKE_SYSTEM MATCHES MSYS_NT
DEFINED CMAKE_FIND_PACKAGE_NAME AND NOT FPHSA_NAME_MISMATCHED AND NOT _NAME STREQUAL CMAKE_FIND_PACKAGE_NAME
